'''Brak Dunell''' was a member of the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]]. He used the alias '''Bel Janius''' when he posed as a [[Mrlsst Trade and Science Academy]] graduate and was the anonymous benefactor of the [[Pan-Tapani Historical Society]].

==Biography==
He infiltrated the [[Justice Action Network]] terrorist group, during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. After the JAN failed to destroy an Imperial [[Unidentified Torpedo Sphere (Tallaan)|Torpedo Sphere]], docked at [[Tallaan]], this gave Dunell and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] the basis for staging a complete subjugation of [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]].
